commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: A narrow automated repair can fix the remaining comment-router classification bug and add regression coverage.; Needs attention: The diff still has a concrete automation security-boundary concern in the comment-router override path.; Review finding: [P1] Classify routed overrides before rendering jobs — src/repair/comment-router.ts:1884 (sha=272de507c5ed02d000d2110c8bfcfc45262b2206)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `/clawsweeper build override` parsing, issue implementation override metadata, soft/hard intake blocker handling, hard-override non-code job rendering, docs, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR head shows `issueImplementationJobOptions()` always passes `overrideBlockerClass: "soft"` for comment-router overrides, while the renderer only blocks `fix` and `raise_pr` when the class is `hard`.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can fix the remaining comment-router classification bug and add regression coverage.

target.title: feat: add issue build override
target.body:
## Summary

- add `/clawsweeper build override` parsing and override metadata for issue implementation jobs
- classify issue implementation blockers as soft or hard so overrides either attempt one bounded PR or produce a safe non-code handoff
- update refusal messaging, operations docs, and focused parser/intake/router tests
- hard override jobs now validate as non-code handoffs by blocking `fix`, `raise_pr`, `close`, and `merge`; existing issue implementation jobs are rewritten when an override is requested

## Validation

- `pnpm run build`
- `pnpm run build:repair`
- `pnpm exec node --test test/repair/comment-router-core.test.ts test/repair/issue-implementation-intake.test.ts`
- `pnpm run check`

## Override proof

Local live proof command after `build:repair` exercised the soft/hard override paths and hard job frontmatter:

```json
{
  "soft": {
    "status": "override_queued_for_repair",
    "shouldRepair": true,
    "blockerClass": "soft",
    "operatorOverride": true
  },
  "hard": {
    "status": "override_handoff",
    "shouldRepair": true,
    "blockerClass": "hard",
    "operatorOverride": true
  },
  "hardJob": {
    "validateErrors": [],
    "allowedActions": ["comment", "label"],
    "blockedActions": ["fix", "raise_pr", "close", "merge"],
    "allowFixPr": false,
    "containsFixArtifactInstruction": false,
    "containsHandoffInstruction": true
  }
}
```

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/200
target.author: takhoffman

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
